## This Is Not Tiredness

the contemplative tradition holds that the path begins with one honest look at what is actuall

run_excerpt: This is why burnout can look so much like a crisis of values, and why people in it make drastic decisions — quitting, le
This is not a new set of values arriving.
It is the body accurately reporting the cost of sustained overfunctioning.

findings.summary: integration starvation — 3+ consecutive named insights with no dwell beat between them (criterion #13 broken band; §7.3 dwell contract)

run_excerpt: This is why a burned-out person can feel exhausted by a day in which they accomplished very little.
A meaningful share of burnout's exhaustion is not the cost of doing.
It is the cost of dreading, rehearsing, and bracing against the doing.

findings.summary: integration starvation — 3+ consecutive named insights with no dwell beat between them (criterion #13 broken band; §7.3 dwell contract)

run_excerpt: This is not a call to fill your calendar.
This is why reassurance from outside so often fails to touch it.
This is not an insight that arrives intellectually.
